title: Book Repair Knife
description: Whenever a non-Minion enemy dies to [gold]Doom[/gold], heal [green]3[/green] HP.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Heals for 3 HP for each non-Minion enemy that dies to Doom. The heal amount multiplies by the number of qualifying enemies killed in a single turn.
